subject: docs(specs): add marketplace & e-commerce platform specifications
body:
Added Takealot, Amazon (with A+ Content modules), SA marketplaces
(Makro, Bob Shop, Gumtree with comparison table), Shopify, and Etsy
specs covering product image requirements, background rules, and
platform-specific assets.
